name: Flirt! Hate! Date Everything!
description:
Warning:Spoilers of the game, LGBT in a huge amount, a huge amount of kinks that I don't want to tag because it's a lot

Have you ever wonder...how it's not to feel so lonely? How pass your days as you find another way to get a job? How many times you have to stay in house before...OH LOOK, A COOL PAIR OF GLASSES

Presenting to you! The dateviators, the glasses that shows you the flipside, the place where you recognize the existence of anything, and where your adventure in the house starts!

Ovbiusly once you got fired of your job, try to reunite your bosses was a bad idea, try to get back your job, and where the only thing keeping your house is that somehow everything is paying each service somehow and somewhere.

Leaving you caged and closed in your house.

So yeah, this have spoilers of the ending of the game.

Updates Log:
